mandatory_changes.requirement: Create a versioned hash-bound resolution registry; qualification must not query live REST to adopt a row.
mandatory_changes.title: Frozen comparator evidence

mandatory_changes.requirement: Freeze ZIP/schema verification, raw retention, full-key grouping, duplicate classification, candidate validation, registry resolution, provenance, merge, eligibility and panel order.
mandatory_changes.title: Fixed processing order

mandatory_changes.requirement: Freeze symbol/interval/open_time UTC key, exact field names/types, Decimal equality and the equality role of ignore.
mandatory_changes.title: Canonical key and 12-field semantics

mandatory_changes.requirement: Collapse only complete groups whose every raw 12-field string is identical; preserve all members; block semantic, conflicting and parser-created groups.
mandatory_changes.title: Complete duplicate-group rules

mandatory_changes.requirement: Require checksum/schema/uniqueness/validity, complete duplicate processing, two frozen REST matches, monthly equality except invalid fields and no unresolved conflict.
mandatory_changes.title: Daily correction candidate qualification

mandatory_changes.requirement: Resolve only exact registered conflict/source/evidence hashes under an adopted V3 contract; every unknown conflict becomes blocked_pending_adjudication.
mandatory_changes.title: Fail-closed resolution registry

mandatory_changes.requirement: Separate raw_row_quarantine from research_panel_quarantine and report duplicate collapses, monthly quarantine, admitted corrections, unresolved conflicts, blocked months and zero synthetic fills.
mandatory_changes.title: Two quarantine layers

mandatory_changes.requirement: Freeze the first V3 public comparison to 2020-01-01 through 2026-06; later accrual is a separate task.
mandatory_changes.title: Fixed first V3 range

mandatory_changes.requirement: Bind eligibility registry, conflict policy, resolution registry, adjudication evidence/schema, source/canonical schemas and authorization matrix into the V3 contract hash.
mandatory_changes.title: Contract hash bindings

mandatory_changes.requirement: Store current PR head_sha separately from the first frozen evidence_commit and validate that neither field impersonates the other.
mandatory_changes.title: Governance SHA semantics

review_questions.finding: Canonical collapse can be lossless only when every raw row, line number, multiplicity and hash remains immutable provenance.
review_questions.required_change: Freeze the raw-preservation and canonical-collapse manifest contract in A4/A7.

review_questions.finding: The draft states retention but does not define a machine schema that proves all raw members remain present.
review_questions.required_change: Bind multiplicity, all raw-row hashes and retained canonical hash in A4.

review_questions.finding: The five BTT rows have checksum-verified daily ZIP evidence and two agreeing public REST comparators, but runtime use must not depend on mutable REST.
review_questions.required_change: Freeze comparator payloads and row evidence in the A1 registry and enforce A5 candidate qualification.
review_questions.topic: Invalid monthly to daily replacement has sufficient official evidence

review_questions.finding: The draft correctly rejects REST as primary history.
review_questions.required_change: Make frozen REST evidence registry-only and prohibit live REST adoption during qualification under A1/A6.

review_questions.finding: The draft is not replay-complete because it has no versioned resolution registry or hash binding.
review_questions.required_change: Add A1, A6 and A9 before adoption.

review_questions.finding: The evidence probe is networked and current REST can change; using it during qualification would make results time-dependent.
review_questions.required_change: Qualification must consume only frozen comparator evidence and fail on binding mismatch.

review_questions.finding: The classifier distinguishes exact, semantic and conflicting groups, but the policy must classify the complete key group rather than a selected pair.
review_questions.required_change: Freeze the complete-group rule, including two-identical-plus-one-conflicting, in A2/A4.

review_questions.finding: Collapsing before complete-key grouping can hide a third differing row.
review_questions.required_change: Group all raw rows before any collapse and block any heterogeneous group under A2.
review_questions.topic: Collapse cannot hide a later conflict

review_questions.finding: The proposed result is deterministic in principle, but the exact processing order and order-independent hashes are not specified.
review_questions.required_change: Freeze A2 and require cold/warm/worker equality in the first V3 rerun.

review_questions.finding: The proposal is asset- and time-neutral and rejects special cases.
review_questions.required_change: V3 must enforce registry-driven generic resolution and static fault tests under A6.
review_questions.topic: No asset or date special cases

review_questions.finding: Top-15, prior-90-day median, 365-day history, UTC activation and tie-break are explicitly unchanged.
The policy uses source validity and frozen provenance, not membership or strategy outcomes.
The draft intends fail-closed behavior but an unknown conflict could still match a broad rule without a registry.
review_questions.required_change: Require exact conflict/source/evidence bindings and blocked_pending_adjudication in A6.

review_questions.finding: V2 cannot represent approved canonical source resolutions without changing authority semantics.
review_questions.required_change: Create V3 contract, resolution registry, canonicalization and manifest schemas bound by A9.

review_questions.finding: Independent audit is feasible if raw and canonical quarantines, resolution IDs, source hashes and deterministic manifests are separately exposed.
review_questions.required_change: Implement A7/A9; U-03F remains unauthorized until a truthful V3 qualification pass.

content.stop_condition: ADR-0013 remains proposed and V2 remains blocked until every mandatory change is implemented and independently checked.
